title: Junior Business Development Manager at REA India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at REA India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? REA India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
